PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+(push\s+.*--force|push\s+-f|reset\s+--hard|clean\s+-f|branch\s+-D)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive git command detected: $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
PreToolUse.windows: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+(push\s+.*--force|push\s+-f|reset\s+--hard|clean\s+-f|branch\s+-D)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive git command detected: $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
